steps.description: Configure global layout, fonts, and Tailwind theme with dark sleek styling
steps.commit_message: chore: configure layout, global styles and tailwind theme

files.description: Root layout with dark background, font setup, and metadata
Global CSS with dark theme variables and custom scrollbar styles
Extended Tailwind config with custom colors for weather gradients and dark palette

steps.description: Build the mock weather data service and TypeScript types
steps.commit_message: feat: add weather types and mock data service

files.description: TypeScript interfaces for CurrentWeather, HourlyForecast, DailyForecast, WeatherAlert, and AirQuality
Mock weather data generator that returns realistic current, hourly, daily, UV index, humidity, wind, and air quality data keyed by city name
Utility functions: getWeatherIcon, getWindDirection, formatTime, getAQILabel, getUVIndexLabel

steps.description: Create the API route for fetching weather data
steps.commit_message: feat: add weather API route using mock service

files.description: GET API route that accepts a city query param and returns full weather data from the mock service
GET API route that accepts a query param and returns a list of matching city name suggestions

steps.description: Build core UI components for the weather dashboard
steps.commit_message: feat: add core weather UI components

files.description: Animated search bar with autocomplete dropdown for city suggestions
Hero card showing temperature, condition icon, feels-like, city name, and date/time
Horizontally scrollable row of hourly temperature and icon cards for the next 24 hours
7-day forecast list with high/low temps, condition icons, and precipitation probability
Grid of metric cards: humidity, wind speed/direction, UV index, visibility, pressure, and dew point

steps.description: Build supplemental analytics components and wire the main page
steps.commit_message: feat: add analytics panels and compose main dashboard page

files.description: Card showing AQI value with color-coded gauge bar and pollutant breakdown
Visual arc diagram showing sunrise, sunset times, and current sun position
Collapsible alert banner shown when severe weather alerts exist in the data
Main page composing SearchBar, CurrentWeather, HourlyForecast, WeeklyForecast, WeatherMetrics, AirQualityCard, SunriseSunset, and WeatherAlerts with loading skeleton states and error handling

steps.description: Add loading skeletons, error states, and responsive polish
steps.commit_message: feat: add skeletons, error states, and responsive layout polish

files.description: Reusable animated skeleton placeholder components for each weather card section
Friendly error card with retry button shown when weather fetch fails or city not found
Custom React hook managing weather fetch state, loading, error, and city persistence via localStorage
